SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.file

Class JkZipTree

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.file.JkAbstractPathTree<JkZipTree>
dev.jeka.core.api.file.JkZipTree
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable
public class JkZipTree extends JkAbstractPathTree<JkZipTree> implements Closeable
A JkPathTree for zip path tree located in a zip file. Instances are supposed to be closed by the user code, in a try-with-resource statement or in a finally clause.

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static JkZipTree of(Path zipFile)
      Creates a path tree from a zip file. The zip file content will be seen as a regular folder. Warn : Don't forget to close this resource when you are finished with.
